channel.title: SE — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on SE (Sea Limited) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Chase Coleman: ADDED SE (+22%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Chase Coleman (Tiger Global Management) added SE in Q4 2025 · 5.8% of portfolio. Building Sea Limited — Southeast Asia.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Chase Coleman)
